title: Assignments through virtual interface are unsafe in multi-threaded mode

features.name: virtual interface assignment to interface instance
features.description: Code should include a virtual interface variable assigned from an interface instance

features.name: concurrent always blocks accessing same interface member via virtual and direct reference
features.description: Code should include two always @(posedge) blocks that assign to the same interface member, one through a virtual interface and one directly

features.name: multiple non-atomic assignments to wide interface member in single always block
features.description: Code should include an always @(posedge) block with sequential non-blocking assignments to the same wide interface member through virtual interface and direct reference
